title: ficus arnottiana
intro: Ficus arnottiana, also known as the Malay banyan or Singapore banyan, is a species of fig tree native to the tropical regions of Asia. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in Southeast Asian cultures, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ficus arnottiana include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
